name: UniClawBench: A Universal Benchmark for Proactive Agents on Real-World Tasks

four_principles_filter.去粗取精: 研讨厅按 intake_score≥0.6 + 子系统匹配入库
four_principles_filter.去伪存真: 代码级落地/规划态已在决策中标注
four_principles_filter.由表及里: 研讨厅驱动正式入库固化

digest_notes: We introduce UniClawBench, the first capability-driven benchmark designed to evaluate proactive agents in dynamic, real-world settings. Built around five foundational model capabilities: Skill Usage, Exploration, Long-Context Reasoning, Multimodal Understanding, and Cross-Platform Coordination. 400 bilingual real-world tasks evaluated in live Docker containers with fine-grained step-by-step completion checkpoints. A closed-loop evaluation strategy comprising executor, hidden supervisor, and user
